response: To reinvite a candidate to the Hackerrank assessment and add extra time, follow these steps: 1. Log in to your HackerRank for Work account using your credentials. 2. Go to the Tests tab. 3. Select the test you want to modify. 4. Go to the Candidates tab. 5. Select the checkbox next to the candidate(s). 6. Click More > Add Time. 7. Enter the time in minutes (e.g., 53 minutes for an extra 50% of the original duration). 8. Click Confirm. The email sent to the candidate will now reflect the updated test duration, and you can send the re-invite email.
justification: The provided text describes how to modify a Hackerrank assessment by adding extra time for candidates, which is within the scope of support services offered by HackerRank. The steps are clear and actionable, making it suitable for a reply without needing additional evidence.
